runway_notes.08:
RWY 08 - left-hand pattern (inference, pattern north over Lake Zurich shore to avoid town to the south).
Elev 1335 ft; pattern altitude 2335 ft (1000 ft AGL).
AFIS 123.200.
CRITICAL: under LSZH TMA Sector East, floor 4500 ft - stay well below.
LSPW seaplane base (Switzerland's only seaplane operation) shares the area.
runway_notes.26:
RWY 26 - right-hand pattern (inference, pattern north over Lake Zurich shore to avoid town to the south).
Elev 1335 ft; pattern altitude 2335 ft (1000 ft AGL).
AFIS 123.200.
CRITICAL: under LSZH TMA Sector East, floor 4500 ft - stay well below.

metadata.source: X-Plane apt.dat (ARP, runway thresholds, AFIS frequency); Wikipedia DE for elevation and runway dimensions; VRPs are plausibility-based topographic inferences
metadata.verified_by: thWelly + plugin-author research; VRPs and pattern direction are plausibility-based - needs verification against current Skyguide VAC before flight
metadata.notes: ARP and runway 08/26 asphalt 500 m x 18 m taken from apt.dat and Wikipedia. VRPs N/E/S/W are placeholders pointing toward Lake Zurich (N), Tuggen-Linthebene (E), Buttikon (S), and Pfaeffikon SZ (W) - approximately 2.5-3 NM from ARP, NOT the published Skyguide VAC points. Pattern direction (08=left, 26=right) inferred to keep pattern north over the lake shore. AFIS 123.200 confirmed by apt.dat row 1054. Adjacent LSPW seaplane ICAO at the same site is intentionally not modelled (separate ICAO; this plugin handles fixed-airfield ops only).
